1809090.name: Kraino Rebirth
1809090.description:
sharpen thy scythe & lock n’ load! for you are about to enter a vast world of monsters, magic & mayhem!

kraino is once again called into action! with his deadly scythe & hand-cannon

Cut & blast your way through a meticulously hand-crafted non-linear world filled with hazards, Ghoulies & ghosts!

Gain powerful abilities to reach the unknown.

The world is vast & filled with more than just enemies, Along your journey you’ll encounter some friendly faces some of which might aid you

(for a price)
1809090.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
